title: festuca pratensis var. elatior
intro: Festuca pratensis var. elatior, also known as tall fescue, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health. Festuca pratensis var. elatior can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
